title: Testing Ericsson v. 1Finity in AT&T's open RAN
content: Ericsson and 1Finity small cell radios in AT&T's network went head-to-head in a benchmark performance test from Signals Research Group, preceding further rollouts later this year.

title: Render Networks broadens vision beyond FTTH
content: Equipped with new funding and the acquisition of mPower Innovations, Render is expanding its customer base and positioning itself as an end-to-end system for critical infrastructure builds, according to CEO Stephen Rose.
